title: Simply Glowing Zinc [Create]
description: A resource pack that makes the zinc ores from create simply glow and glint(animation). Support "Optifine" and "Continuity" Mod!
body:
**ZINC GLOW ONLY IF HAVING ONE OF THESE THINGS INSTALLED:**

---

Optifine (Forge) or
Continuity (Fabric/Forge/NeoForge/Quilt)

The Resource pack relies on the Emissive properties of these. Without it the resource pack will work but no glowing and there will be only animated glint.

And of course you need Create mod. (Textures from version 6.0.1)

## Showcase:

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a70a818a416f77230c34d377f1a5358cd3f84970.gif)

In addition you can mix it with my other zinc resoursepack for glow and animation on 3D model [Simply 3D Zinc](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simply-3d-zinc):
